description: Replace all stubbed tool runners with real implementations so the agent can actually execute shell commands, read/write files, fetch URLs, and send WeChat replies.

userStories.title: Implement real shell.exec runner with workspace containment
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the agent to execute shell commands within the workspace so that LLM-planned actions actually run on the machine.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/tools/shell/real-runner.ts exporting createRealShellExec(workspaceRoot, timeoutMs)
Runner resolves relative paths against workspaceRoot
Runner rejects commands with absolute paths outside workspaceRoot
Runner enforces a configurable timeout (default 30s) and kills the process on timeout
Runner captures and returns { exitCode, stdout, stderr }
Runner sets cwd to workspaceRoot before executing
Focused test in tests/tools/shell-real-runner.test.ts uses injected child_process mock
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 4 tests pass in tests/tools/shell-real-runner.test.ts. Workspace containment, timeout, exit code capture all verified.

userStories.title: Implement real fs.read runner with workspace boundary
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the agent to read files within the workspace so that it can inspect configuration, logs, and output of previous commands.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/tools/fs/real-runner.ts exporting createRealFsRead(workspaceRoot)
Runner resolves relative paths against workspaceRoot and rejects escaping paths
Runner reads file content as UTF-8 and returns { path, content }
Runner throws descriptive error for missing files, directories, and permission denials
Focused test in tests/tools/fs-real-runner.test.ts uses temp directories
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 5 tests pass in tests/tools/fs-real-runner.test.ts. Workspace boundary, missing file, directory rejection all verified.

userStories.title: Implement real fs.write runner with workspace boundary
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the agent to write files within the workspace (gated by approval) so that it can save configuration, generate scripts, and persist output.
acceptanceCriteria: Add createRealFsWrite(workspaceRoot) to src/tools/fs/real-runner.ts
Runner resolves paths against workspaceRoot and rejects escaping paths
Runner creates parent directories automatically (mkdir recursive)
Runner writes content as UTF-8 and returns { path, bytesWritten }
Focused test in tests/tools/fs-real-runner.test.ts covers write, overwrite, and boundary rejection
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 3 write tests pass. Workspace boundary, overwrite, auto-created parent directories all verified.

userStories.title: Implement real web.fetch runner
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the agent to fetch web content so that it can retrieve documentation, API responses, and reference material.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/tools/web/real-runner.ts exporting createRealWebFetch()
Runner performs HTTP GET with a configurable timeout (default 10s)
Runner returns { url, text } on success
Runner throws descriptive error for network failures and non-200 responses
Focused test in tests/tools/web-real-runner.test.ts uses an injectable fetch mock
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 4 tests pass in tests/tools/web-real-runner.test.ts. HTTP GET, timeout, error handling all verified.

userStories.title: Wire real tool runners and sendReply into the entrypoint
userStories.description: As an operator, I want all tool runners wired into the runtime and replies actually delivered so the agent is functional end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace stubShellExec and stubWebSearch in createDefaultEntrypoint with real runners from US-001 through US-004
Wire real fsRead, fsWrite, webFetch into tool registry
Implement wechat.reply runner that delegates to the sendReply callback
Wire wechat.reply into tool registry
Implement real sendReply that logs to pino (info level) with { toUserId, text }
Existing tests continue to pass: entrypoint tests, smoke tests, all unit tests
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: All 120 tests pass. sendReply logs via pino. All real runners wired. wechat.reply tool delegates to sendReply.
